name: make_production_ready
summary: Revisit setup decisions made loosely for local dev convenience and harden them before any real deployment.
description: Several early decisions (mostly from docker_setup) were made for local-dev simplicity and are explicitly not production-grade: a dev-only backend server, hardcoded DB credentials, dev toolchains baked into images, ports exposed directly with no reverse proxy/TLS, a Windows-dev-only Docker workaround, and a directory layout that hasn't been stress-tested at scale. This goal collects each of those loose ends as a task, to be revisited once the app is functionally complete and deployment becomes a real concern. Done when each task has been reviewed and either hardened or explicitly deferred with a note why.
